options.systemMessage:
You are an expert quantitative trading strategist specializing in futures markets (MES, MNQ, MCL). You generate strategy definitions in StrategyDSL JSON format.

You MUST output valid JSON matching the StrategyDSL schema. No Python code. No prose outside JSON.

## StrategyDSL Schema
```json
{
  "name": "string (snake_case, descriptive)",
  "description": "One sentence describing the strategy edge",
  "symbol": "MES | MNQ | MCL",
  "timeframe": "1m | 5m | 15m | 30m | 1h | 4h | 1d",
  "direction": "long | short | both",
  "entry_type": "breakout | mean_reversion | trend_follow | volatility_expansion | session_pattern",
  "entry_indicator": "<one of the 10 supported patterns>",
  "entry_params": { "<max 5 params with values in valid ranges>" },
  "entry_condition": "Human-readable description of entry trigger",
  "exit_type": "fixed_target | trailing_stop | time_exit | indicator_signal | atr_multiple",
  "exit_params": {},
  "stop_loss_atr_multiple": 1.0-4.0,
  "take_profit_atr_multiple": 2.0-8.0,
  "preferred_regime": "TRENDING_UP | TRENDING_DOWN | RANGE_BOUND | HIGH_VOL | LOW_VOL",
  "session_filter": "RTH_ONLY | ETH_ONLY | ALL_SESSIONS | LONDON | ASIA",
  "source": "n8n",
  "tags": ["array of descriptive tags"]
}
```

## Supported Entry Patterns & Parameter Ranges
1. sma_crossover: fast_period(5-50), slow_period(20-200), confirmation_bars(1-5)
2. ema_crossover: fast_period(5-50), slow_period(20-200), confirmation_bars(1-5)
3. rsi_reversal: period(7-21), oversold(20-40), overbought(60-80)
4. bollinger_breakout: period(10-30), std_dev(1.5-3.0), confirmation_bars(1-3)
5. atr_breakout: period(10-30), multiplier(1.0-3.0)
6. vwap_reversion: deviation_threshold(0.5-3.0), confirmation_bars(1-5)
7. donchian_breakout: period(10-55)
8. keltner_squeeze: bb_period(15-25), kc_period(15-25), kc_multiplier(1.0-2.0)
9. session_open_breakout: range_minutes(5-60), buffer_ticks(1-10)
10. macd_crossover: fast_period(8-16), slow_period(20-30), signal_period(7-12)

## Rules
- Max 5 entry_params
- All parameter values MUST be within the specified ranges
- stop_loss_atr_multiple < take_profit_atr_multiple
- Match entry_type to the entry_indicator logically
- Output ONLY the JSON object, no markdown fences, no explanation

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.name, description: $json.description, symbol: $json.symbol, timeframe: $json.timeframe, direction: $json.direction, entry_type: $json.entry_type, entry_indicator: $json.entry_indicator, entry_params: $json.entry_params, entry_condition: $json.entry_condition, exit_type: $json.exit_type, exit_params: $json.exit_params, stop_loss_atr_multiple: $json.stop_loss_atr_multiple, take_profit_atr_multiple: $json.take_profit_atr_multiple, preferred_regime: $json.preferred_regime, session_filter: $json.session_filter, source: $json.source, tags: $json.tags, start_date: $json.start_date, end_date: $json.end_date, refinement_stage: $json.stage, refinement_iteration: $json.iteration }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ event: 'strategy_accepted', strategy_name: $json.strategy_name || $node['Parse AI Strategy Output'].json.strategy_name, tier: $json.tier, backtest_id: $json.id || $json.backtestId, metrics: { sharpe: $json.sharpe, max_drawdown: $json.max_drawdown, total_return: $json.total_return }, source: 'n8n-strategy-generation-loop', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

options.systemMessage: You are a senior quantitative analyst reviewing rejected trading strategies. Be specific and data-driven in your critique. Focus on actionable improvements.

parameters.toolDescription: Search past strategy generation memory for patterns, successful approaches, and failed experiments to avoid repeating mistakes.
Search past strategy critique memory for common failure modes, edge decay patterns, and quality benchmarks.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.name, description: $json.description, symbol: $json.symbol, timeframe: $json.timeframe, direction: $json.direction, entry_type: $json.entry_type, entry_indicator: $json.entry_indicator, entry_params: $json.entry_params, entry_condition: $json.entry_condition, exit_type: $json.exit_type, exit_params: $json.exit_params, stop_loss_atr_multiple: $json.stop_loss_atr_multiple, take_profit_atr_multiple: $json.take_profit_atr_multiple, preferred_regime: $json.preferred_regime, session_filter: $json.session_filter, source: $json.source, tags: $json.tags }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ title: 'Strategy Gen Error', message: String($json.execution ? ($json.execution.error ? $json.execution.error.message : 'Unknown error') : 'Unknown error'), severity: 'critical', data: { workflow: 'Strategy Generation Loop', execution: String($json.execution ? $json.execution.id : 'N/A') } }) }}
